name: fable-sonnet-orchestrator-kit
description: Issue-to-worktree-to-PR orchestration for Codex with model-tiered executors and deterministic stop gating.

interface.shortDescription: Run model-tiered issue-to-PR workflows in Codex
interface.longDescription: Turns the main Codex agent into an orchestrator that plans GitHub issues, delegates each issue to an isolated executor, verifies pull requests, and waits for human merge approval.
defaultPrompt: Use $orch to enable orchestrator mode for this repository.
Use $orch to report the current orchestrator status.
